1000.full_name: 'Abdullah ibn 'Amr bin Haram b. Tha'laba b. Haram b. Ka'b b. Ghanm b. Ka'b b. Salima
1000.arabic: عبد الله بن عمرو بن حرام بن ثعلبة
1000.bio: Prophet(ﷺ) buried both ‘Abdullah bin ‘Amr bin Haram and ‘Amr bin Al-Jamuh in one grave at Uhud due to the affection they used to possess to each other.

1001.full_name: Khirash bin al-Simma bin 'Amr bin al-Jamuh bin Zayd b. Haram b. Ka'b b. Ghanm b. Ka'b b. Salima
1001.arabic: خراش بن الصمة بن عمرو بن الجموح
1001.mother_name: Umm Habib bint 'Abdur Rahman from Ta'if
1001.spouses: Fukahya bint Yazid of B.Salima,Umm Walad

1002.full_name: 'Umair bin Humam bin al-Jamuh bin Zayd b. Haram b. Ka'b b. Ghanm b. Ka'b b. Salima
1002.arabic: عمير بن الحمام بن الجموح الأنصاري
1002.bio: The Brotherhood was made b/w him and 'Ubaida bin al-Harith. Both were martyred at Badr.

1003.full_name: Qutba bin 'Amir bin Hadida b. 'Amr b. Sawad b. Ghanm b. Ka'b b. Salima
1003.bio: A member of Khazraj tribe of Madinah.  Met with the prophet (ﷺ)in the elevent year of his mission, 620 CE.  Among the six people from Yathrib to make the pledge to accept and spread Islam and to return the following year with new converts.

1004.full_name: 'Uqba bin 'Amir bin Nabi b. Zayd b. Haram b. Ka'b b. Ghanm b. Ka'b b. Salima
1004.bio: A member of Khazraj tribe of Madinah.  Met with the prophet (ﷺ)in the elevent year of his mission, 620 CE.  Among the six people from Yathrib to make the pledge to accept and spread Islam and to return the following year with new converts.

1005.full_name: Jabir bin 'Abdullah bin Ri'ab b. Nu'man b. Sinan b. 'Ubaid b. 'Aidy b. Ghanm b. Ka'b b. Salima
1005.arabic: جابر بن عبد الله بن رئاب
1005.mother_name: Umm Jabir bint Zuhayr of B. Salima
1005.bio: A member of Khazraj tribe of Madinah.  Met with the prophet (ﷺ)in the elevent year of his mission, 620 CE.  Among the six people from Yathrib to make the pledge to accept and spread Islam.

1006.full_name: Mu'adh bin 'Amr bin al-Jamuh bin Zayd b. Haram b. Ka'b b. Ghanm b. Ka'b b. Salima
1006.arabic: معاذ بن عمرو بن الجموح بن زيد الأنصاري
1006.bio: He and his two brothers and mother were among the first batch of people living in Medinah to accept Islam due to the teachings of Mus'ab ibn 'Umair, who was sent by the Prophet (ﷺ) before the hijra to spread Islam.  Along with his brothers and mother, they helped convert their father.  According to most sources, He and Mu'awwidh bin 'Afra', killed Abu Jahl in the Battle of Badr.
1006.spouses: Thabia bint 'Amr bin Sa'd of B.Sai'da

1007.full_name: Mu'awwidh bin 'Amr bin al-Jamuh bin Zayd b. Haram b. Ka'b b. Ghanm b. Ka'b b. Salima
1007.arabic: معوذ بن عمرو بن الجموح بن زيد الأنصاري
1007.bio: He and his two brothers and mother were among the first batch of people living in Medinah to accept Islam due to the teachings of Mus'ab ibn 'Umair, who was sent by the Prophet (ﷺ) before the hijra to spread Islam.  Along with his brothers and mother, they helped convert their father.

1008.full_name: Khallad bin 'Amr bin al-Jamuh bin Zayd b. Haram b. Ka'b b. Ghanm b. Ka'b b. Salima
1008.arabic: خلاد بن عمرو بن الجموح بن زيد الأنصاري
1008.bio: He and his two brothers and mother were among the first batch of people living in Medinah to accept Islam due to the teachings of Mus'ab ibn 'Umair, who was sent by the Prophet (ﷺ) before the hijra to spread Islam.  Along with his brothers and mother, they helped convert their father.

1009.full_name: Thabit bin Tha'laba(al-Jidha') bin Zayd b. Harith b. Haram b. Ka'b b. Ghanm b. Ka'b b. Salima
1009.mother_name: Umm Annas bint S'ad of B.Qadha'a

1010.full_name: 'Umair bin al-Harith (b. Labda) b. Tha'laba b. al-Harith b. Haram b. Ka'b b. Ghanm b. Ka'b b. Salima
1010.arabic: عمير بن الحارث بن لبدة بن ثعلبة

1011.full_name: Tamim client Khirash bin al-Simma b. 'Amr b. al-Jamuh b. Zayd b. Haram b. Ka'b b. Ghanm b. Ka'b
1011.arabic: تميم مولى خراش بن الصمة الأنصاري
1011.bio: The brotherhood was made b/w him and Habab Client of 'Utba bin Ghazwan

1012.full_name: Habib bin al-Aswad Client of B.Haram
1012.arabic: حبيب بن الأسود مولى لبني حرام

1013.full_name: 'Amr bin al-Jamuh bin Zayd b. Haram b. Ka'b b. Ghanm b. Ka'b b. Salima
1013.bio: Prophet(ﷺ) buried both ‘Abdullah bin ‘Amr bin Haram and ‘Amr bin Al-Jamuh in one grave at Uhud due to the affection they used to possess to each other.

1014.full_name: Bara' bin Ma'rur bin Sakhr b. Khansa b. Sinan b. 'Ubaid b. 'Adi b. Ghanm b. Ka'b b. Salima
1014.arabic: البراء بن معرور بن صخر بن خنساء
1014.bio: The first of the Aqaba Chief to Die. Also the first person to face new Qibla. According to some sources, he died before Prophet's migration and Prophet offered prayer on his grave after migration.

1015.short_name: Bishr bin Bara' bin Ma'rur bin Sakhr
1015.full_name: Bishr bin Bara' bin Ma'rur bin Sakhr b. Khansa b. Sinan b. 'Ubaid b. 'Adi b. Ghanm b. Ka'b b. Salima
1015.arabic: بشر بن البراء بن معرور بن صخر
1015.bio: Brotherhhod was made b/w him and Waqid bin 'Abdullah. He died on day of Khaybar after eating poisonous mutton with Prophet. Prophet(ﷺ) also declared him as the Chief of B.Salima.

1016.short_name: 'Abdullah bin al-Jadd bin Qays bin Sakhr
1016.full_name: 'Abdullah bin al-Jadd bin Qays bin Sakhr b. Khansa b. Sinan b. 'Ubaid b. 'Adi b. Ghanm b. Ka'b
1016.arabic: عبد الله بن الجد بن قيس الأنصاري السلمي
1016.bio: He is brother of Mu'adh bin Jabal from mother side. His father was considered, by some scholars, as one of the Hypocrite.

1017.full_name: Sinan bin Sayfi b. Sakhr b. Khansa b. Sinan b. 'Ubaid b. 'Adi b. Ghanm b. Ka'b b. Salima

1018.full_name: 'Utba bin 'Abdullah b. Sakhr b. Khansa b. Sinan b. 'Ubaid b. 'Adi b. Ghanm b. Ka'b b. Salima
1018.arabic: عتبة بن عبد الله بن صخر

1019.full_name: Tufayl bin Malik bin Khansa' b. Sinan b. 'Ubaid b. 'Adi b. Ghanm b. Ka'b b. Salima
1019.arabic: طفيل بن مالك بن خنساء بن سنان

1020.full_name: al-Tufayl bin al-Nu'man bin Khansa' b. Sinan b. 'Ubaid b. 'Adi b. Ghanm b. Ka'b b. Salima

1021.full_name: 'Abdullah bin 'Abd Manaf b. al-Nu'man b. Sinan b. 'Ubaid b. 'Adi b. Ghanm b. Ka'b b. Salima
1021.arabic: عبد الله بن عبد مناف بن النعمان
1021.mother_name: Hamima bint 'Ubaid bin Abi Ka'b of B. Salima
1021.bio: حميمة بنت عبيد بن أبي كعب

1022.full_name: Khulayda/Khulayd bin Qays bin al-Nu'man b. Sinan b. 'Ubaid b. 'Adi b. Ghanm b. Ka'b b. Salima
1022.arabic: خليد/خليدة بن قيس بن النعمان بن سنان
1022.mother_name: Adam bint al-Qayn of B. Salima
1022.bio: Some said his name was Khalid. According to some sources, he had brother named Khallad who participated in battle of Badr.

1023.full_name: Yazid bin al-Mundhir bin Sarh bin Khunas b. Sinan b. 'Ubaid b. 'Adi b. Ghanm b. Ka'b b. Salima
1023.arabic: يزيد بن المنذر بن سرح بن خناس
1023.father_name: al-Mundhir bin Sarh bin Khunas b. Sinan

1024.full_name: Ma'qil bin al-Mundhir bin Sarh bin Khunas b. Sinan b. 'Ubaid b. 'Adi b. Ghanm b. Ka'b b. Salima
1024.arabic: معقل بن المنذر بن سرح بن خناس
1024.father_name: al-Mundhir bin Sarh bin Khunas b. Sinan

1025.full_name: 'Abdullah bin al-Nu'man bin Baldama bin Khunas b. Sinan b. 'Ubaid b. 'Adi b. Ghanm b. Ka'b b. Salima
1025.arabic: عبد الله بن النعمان بن بلذمة بن خناس
1025.father_name: al-Nu'man bin Baldama bin Khunas b. Sinan

1026.full_name: Jabbar bin Sakhr bin Umayya b. Khansa b. Sinan b. 'Ubaid b. 'Adi b. Ghanm b. Ka'b b. Salima
1026.arabic: جبار بن صخر بن أمية بن خنساء
1026.bio: The brotherhood was made b/w him and al-Miqdad bin 'Amr.

1027.full_name: al-Dahhak bin Haritha bin Zayd b. Tha'laba b. 'Ubaid b. 'Adi b. Ghanm b. Ka'b b. Salima
1027.arabic: الضحاك بن حارثة بن زيد بن ثعلبة الأنصاري
1027.father_name: Haritha bin Zayd b. Tha'laba b. 'Ubaid
1027.mother_name: Hind bint Malik bin 'Amir of Biadha
1027.children: Yazid bin al-Dahhak bin Haritha bin Zayd

1028.full_name: Sawad bin Razn/Zurayq bin Zayd b. Tha'laba b. 'Ubaid b. 'Adi b. Ghanm b. Ka'b b. Salima
1028.arabic: سواد بن رزن بن زيد بن ثعلبة
1028.father_name: Haritha bin Zayd b. Tha'laba b. 'Ubaid
1028.mother_name: Umm Qays bint al-Qayn of B. Salima

1029.full_name: 'Abdur Rahman bin al-Hubab bin 'Amr bin 'Ubbad b. 'Amr b. Ghazya b. Sawad b. Ghanm b. Ka'b b. Salima
1029.arabic: عبد الرحمن بن الحباب بن عمرو الأنصاري

1030.full_name: Hamza/Kharija bin al-Humayyir Ally B.'Ubaid bin 'Adi from Ashja' of B.Duhman
1030.arabic: حمزة بن الحمير حليف بني عبيد بن عدي

1031.full_name: 'Abdullah bin al-Humayyir Ally B.'Ubaid bin 'Adi from Ashja' of B.Duhman

1032.full_name: al-Numan bin Sinan Client of B.'Ubaid bin 'Adi
1032.arabic: النعمان بن سنان الأنصاري مولى بني عبيد

1034.full_name: Abu Ayman, Client of 'Amr bin al-Jamuh bin Zayd b. Haram b. Ka'b b. Ghanm b. Ka'b b. Salima

1035.full_name: Yazid bin 'Amir bin Hadida b. 'Amr b. Sawad b. Ghanm b. Ka'b b. Salima

1036.full_name: Salim bin 'Amr bin Hadida b. 'Amr b. Sawad b. Ghanm b. Ka'b b. Salima

1037.full_name: Tha'laba bin 'Anma ibn 'Adi b. Sinan b. Nabi b. 'Amr b. Sawad b. Ghanm b. Ka'b b. Salima
1037.arabic: ثعلبة بن عنمة بن عدي بن سنان
1037.bio: He was killed by Hubairah ibn Abi Wahab b. Amr al-Makhzumi, the husband of Umm Hani bint Abi Talib.

1038.full_name: 'Abs bin 'Amir ibn 'Adi b. Sinan b. Nabi b. 'Amr b. Sawad b. Ghanm b. Ka'b b. Salima
1038.arabic: عبس بن عامر بن عدي بن سنان
1038.mother_name: Umm al-Banin bint Zuhayr b. Tha'laba of B.Salima

1039.full_name: al-Hubab bin 'Amr bin 'Ubbad b. 'Amr b. Ghazya b. Sawad b. Ghanm b. Ka'b b. Salima
1039.mother_name: Nusayba bint Qays bin Aswad of B.Salima

1040.full_name: K'ab bin 'Amr bin 'Ubbad b. 'Amr b. Sawad b. Ghanm b. Ka'b b. Salima
1040.arabic: أبو اليسر , كعب بن عمرو بن عباد
1040.mother_name: Nusayba bint Qays bin Aswad of B.Salima
1040.bio: The Last of the Companion of Badr to die. He has narrated few Ahaadith.

1041.short_name: Sahl bin Qays bin Abi Ka'b
1041.full_name: Sahl bin Qays bin Abi Ka'b b. al-Qayn b. Ka'b b. Sawad b. Ghanm b. Ka'b b. Salima
1041.arabic: سهل بن قيس بن أبي كعب بن القين

1042.full_name: 'Antara Mawla Salim bin 'Amr from B.Sulaym b. Mansur of B.Dhakwan

1044.arabic: يسار مولى بني سليم بن عمرو

1045.short_name: Ma'bad bin Qays (bin Sayfi) b. Sakhr
1045.full_name: Ma'bad bin Qays (bin Sayfi) b. Sakhr b. Haram b. Rabi'a b. 'Adi b. Ghanm b. Ka'b b. Salima
1045.arabic: معبد بن قيس بن صيفي بن صخر
1045.father_name: Qays (bin Sayfi) b. Sakhr b. Haram

1046.full_name: 'Abdullah bin Qays (bin Sayfi) b. Sakhr b. Haram b. Rabi'a b. 'Adi b. Ghanm b. Ka'b b. Salima
1046.arabic: عبد الله بن قيس بن صيفي بن صخر
1046.father_name: Qays (bin Sayfi) b. Sakhr b. Haram

1047.short_name: 'Amr bin Talaq b. Zayd b. Umayya
1047.full_name: 'Amr bin Talaq b. Zayd b. Umayya b. Sinan b. ka'b b. Ghanm b. Ka'b b. Salima
1047.arabic: عمرو بن طلق بن زيد بن أمية
1047.father_name: Talaq b. Zayd b. Umayya b. Sinan

1048.full_name: 'Abdullah bin 'Unays (bin As'ad b. Haram b. Habib b. Malik b. Ghanm b. Ka'b of B.Salima) al-Juhani
1048.arabic: عبد الله بن أنيس الجهني أبو يحيى المدني

1049.full_name: Khalid bin 'Amr bin 'Adi b. Nabi b. 'Amr b. Sawad b. Ghanm b. Ka'b b. Salima
1049.arabic: خالد بن عمرو بن عدي بن نابي
1049.father_name: 'Amr bin 'Adi b. Nabi b. 'Amr b. Sawad

1050.full_name: Hind bint al-Mundhir b. al-Jumah b. Zayd b. Haram b. Ka'b b. Ghanm b. Ka'b b. Salima
1050.arabic: هند بنت المنذر بن الجموح بن زيد
1050.mother_name: ash-Shamus bint Haqq bin Amma bin Haram

1051.short_name: Umm Jamil bint al-Hubbab ibn al-Mundhir
1051.full_name: Umm Jamil bint al-Hubbab b. al-Mundhir b. al-Jumah b. Zayd b. Haram b. Ka'b b. Ghanm b. Ka'b
1051.arabic: أم جميل بنت الحباب بن المنذر

1052.full_name: Mulayka bint 'Abdullah b. Sakhr b. Khansa b. Sinan b. 'Ubaid b. 'Adi b. Ghanm b. Ka'b b. Salima
1052.arabic: مليكة بنت عبد الله بن صخر بن خنساء

1053.full_name: Zaynab bint Sayfi b. Sakhr b. Khansa b. Sinan b. 'Ubaid b. 'Adi b. Ghanm b. Ka'b b. Salima

1054.full_name: Qubaysa bint Sayfi b. Sakhr b. Khansa b. Sinan b. 'Ubaid b. 'Adi b. Ghanm b. Ka'b b. Salima

1055.full_name: Humayna bint Sayfi b. Sakhr b. Khansa b. Sinan b. 'Ubaid b. 'Adi b. Ghanm b. Ka'b b. Salima
1055.bio: According to some scholars, She and Umm Mubashir al-Ansariyya (Id:1293) are same person.

1056.full_name: Hind bint al-Bara' bin Ma'rur b. Shakr b. Khansa b. Sinan b. 'Ubaid b. 'Adi b. Ghanm b. Ka'b
1056.arabic: هند بنت البراء بن معرور الأنصارية

1057.full_name: Sulafa bint al-Bara' bin Ma'rur b. Shakr b. Khansa b. Sinan b. 'Ubaid b. 'Adi b. Ghanm b. Ka'b
1057.arabic: سلافة بنت البراء بن معرور الأنصارية

1058.full_name: Ar-Rabab bint al-Bara' bin Ma'rur b. Shakr b. Khansa b. Sinan b. 'Ubaid b. 'Adi b. Ghanm b. Ka'b
1058.arabic: الرباب بنت البراء بن معرور الأنصارية

1059.full_name: Huzayla bint Mas'ud b. Zayd b. Subay b. Khansa b. Sinan b. 'Ubaid b. 'Adi b. Ghanm b. Ka'b b. Salima
1059.arabic: هزيلة بنت مسعود بن زيد الأنصارية

1060.full_name: Khalida bint Qays bin Thabit bin Khalid bin Ashja'
1060.father_name: Qays bin Thabit bin Khalid bin Ashja'

1061.full_name: Sumayka bint Jabbar bin Sakhr bin Umayya b. Khansa b. Sinan b. 'Ubaid b. 'Adi b. Ghanm b. Ka'b
1061.arabic: سميكة بنت جبار بن صخر بن أمية

1062.full_name: 'Usayma bint Jabbar bin Sakhr bin Umayya b. Khansa b. Sinan b. 'Ubaid b. 'Adi b. Ghanm b. Ka'b
1062.arabic: عصيمة بنت جبار بن صخر بن أمية

1063.full_name: Umm Sulaym bint 'Amr bin 'Ubbad b. 'Amr b. Sawad b. Ghanm b. Ka'b b. Salima
1063.arabic: أم سليم بنت عمرو بن عباد

1064.full_name: Asma' bint 'Amr ibn 'Adi b. Sinan b. Nabi b. 'Amr b. Sawad b. Ghanm b. Ka'b b. Salima
1064.arabic: أم منيع بنت عمرو بن عدي
1064.bio: She was one of the two women present at the second Aqaba pledge. She delivered her son on the same night.

1065.full_name: Unaysa bint 'Anma ibn 'Adi b. Sinan b. Nabi b. 'Amr b. Sawad b. Ghanm b. Ka'b b. Salima

1066.full_name: Umm Bishr bint 'Amr bint 'Anma ibn 'Adi b. Sinan b. Nabi b. 'Amr b. Sawad b. Ghanm b. Ka'b b. Salima
1066.arabic: أم بشر بنت عمرو بن عنمة بن عدي

1067.full_name: 'Aisha bint 'Umair b. al-Harith (b. Labda) b. Tha'laba b. al-Harith b. Haram b. Ka'b b. Ghanm b. Kab

1068.full_name: Fukayha bint al-Sakan bin Zayd b. Umayya b. Sinan b. Ka'b b. Ghanm b. Ka'b b. Salima

1069.short_name: Umm Thabit bint Haritha bin Zayd
1069.full_name: Umm Thabit bint Haritha bin Zayd b. Tha'laba b. 'Ubaid b. 'Adi b. Ghanm b. Ka'b b. Salima
1069.arabic: أم ثابت بنت حارثة بن زيد بن ثعلبة
1069.father_name: Haritha bin Zayd b. Tha'laba b. 'Ubaid
1069.mother_name: Hind bint Malik bin 'Amir of Biadha

1070.full_name: Ash-Shamus bint 'Amr bin Haram b. Tha'laba b. Haram b. Ka'b b. Ghanm b. Ka'b b. Salima

1071.full_name: Hind bint 'Amr bin Haram b. Tha'laba b. Haram b. Ka'b b. Ghanm b. Ka'b b. Salima
1071.bio:
She and her three sons were among the first batch of people living in Medina to accept Islam due to the teachings of Mus'ab ibn 'Umair, who was sent by the Prophet (ﷺ) before the hijra to spread Islam. Later they helped convert her husband.
She was a devoted woman companion. Even when her son (Khallad), husband and brother all died in the Battle of Uhud, she accepted it as the will of Allah (swt) and was happy that Prophet(ﷺ) is fine.

1072.full_name: Lumays bint 'Amr bin Haram b. Tha'laba b. Haram b. Ka'b b. Ghanm b. Ka'b b. Salima

1073.full_name: Umm 'Amr bint 'Amr bin Haram b. Tha'laba b. Haram b. Ka'b b. Ghanm b. Ka'b b. Salima
1073.arabic: أم عمرو بنت عمرو بن حرام الأنصارية

1074.full_name: Fatima bint 'Amr bin Haram b. Tha'laba b. Haram b. Ka'b b. Ghanm b. Ka'b b. Salima

1075.full_name: Umm Mu'adh bint 'Abdullah ibn 'Amr ibn Haram b. Tha'laba b. Haram b. Ka'b b. Ghanm b. Ka'b b. Salima
1075.arabic: أم معاذ بنت عبد الله بن عمرو بن حرام

1076.full_name: Umm Hibban bint 'Amir bin Nabi b. Zayd b. Haram b. Ka'b b. Ghanm b. Ka'b b. Salima

1077.full_name: Adam bint al-Jamuh bin Zayd b. Haram b. Ka'b b. Ghanm b. Ka'b b. Salima

1078.arabic: هند بنت عمرو بن الجموح الأنصارية

1079.full_name: Humayma bint al-Humama bin al-Jamuh bin Zayd b. Haram b. Ka'b b. Ghanm b. Ka'b b. Salima

1080.short_name: Umm al-Harith bint Malik bin Khansa'
1080.full_name: Umm al-Harith bint Malik bin Khansa' b. Sinan b. 'Ubaid b. 'Adi b. Ghanm b. Ka'b b. Salima
1080.arabic: أم الحارث بنت مالك بن خنساء

1081.full_name: Arwa bint Malik bin Khansa' b. Sinan b. 'Ubaid b. 'Adi b. Ghanm b. Ka'b b. Salima

1082.short_name: Umm al-Harith bint al-Nu'man bin Khansa'

1083.full_name: al-Rabi' bint al-Tufayl bin al-Nu'man bin Khansa' b. Sinan b. 'Ubaid b. 'Adi b. Ghanm b. Ka'b

1084.full_name: 'Umayra bint Qurat bin Khansa' b. Sinan b. 'Ubaid b. 'Adi b. Ghanm b. Ka'b b. Salima
1084.arabic: عميرة بنت قرط بن خنساء بن سنان الأنصارية

1085.full_name: Asma' bint Qurat bin Khansa' b. Sinan b. 'Ubaid b. 'Adi b. Ghanm b. Ka'b b. Salima
1085.arabic: أسماء بنت قرط بن خنساء بن سنان الأنصارية
